meta.title: RN - Software Engineer - Curitiba, PR
meta.description: Software Engineer with 2 years of corporate experience, specialized in Java, Spring Boot and high-performance systems.

about.label: ABOUT
about.main: Specialist in Java, Spring Boot and high-performance systems with cloud experience (AWS). With 2 years of corporate experience, I build robust, scalable and testable applications.
about.secondary: Since the beginning of my career, I have focused on writing clean, efficient code with architecture in layers (Controller → Service → Repository). Currently, I am deepening my knowledge in microservices, messaging (Kafka/RabbitMQ) and DevOps culture.

skills.label: EDUCATION & SKILLS
skills.backend_desc: Java 8/17, Spring Boot, RESTful APIs, JPA/Hibernate, JWT, SQL/NoSQL, Docker, CI/CD.
skills.quality_desc: JUnit, Mockito, BDD, code review, clean code, design patterns.

philosophy.quote: Great software is not just functional — it is built to be understood, maintained, and evolved. Architecture and testing are the foundations for scalable systems that last for years.

work.label: PROJECTS
work.card1_desc: Authentication, validation and structured error handling. Layered architecture Controller → Service → Repository with test coverage > 80%.
work.card2_desc: Processing of operational reports via external APIs, reducing manual processing time by ~70% and eliminating input errors.
work.card3_desc: Operations optimization for 500+ internal users, ~30% reduction in ticket resolution time. Quality control and functional testing.
